# atriumsports_sdk Demo API

> Live demo API and UI for the `atriumsports_sdk` package on Cloudflare Workers, providing an example of initializing the SDK inside a WebAssembly environment.

## Deployment Details
- **Demo URL**: https://atriumsports_sdk.pypi.rosetraviss.uk
- **Package Page**: https://pypi.rosetraviss.uk/atriumsports_sdk
- **Primary Host**: https://pypi.rosetraviss.uk

## API Endpoints

### `GET /api/run`
Instantiates the `AtriumSports` SDK client and retrieves the configured `datacore` client.

#### Response Body
- `result` (object): Result containing the `status`, `message`, the internally configured `client_options`, and the `datacore_client_type`.
- `error` (string, if failed): Detailed error output if initialization fails.
